overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through Night City. The player moves from a covered underpass with large red billboards, through a graffiti-covered pedestrian tunnel, and emerges into a sunlit urban street dominated by the Arasaka corporate building and elevated highway infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with large advertising displays

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped pedestrian crossing toward the tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in white coat walking across the crosswalk from left to right

entered.detail: large illuminated red billboards displaying 'DO YOU FEEL THE ITCH?' with motorcycle imagery
several parked vehicles including a beige sedan and green car
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
large structural concrete columns supporting the overpass

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a covered urban underpass dominated by massive red advertising billboards. The player walks across a broad yellow-striped pedestrian crossing, passing a woman in white, while several cars are parked along the right side. The environment is artificially lit with a warm color tone, and a tunnel entrance looms ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered pedestrian tunnel with vehicle traffic

events.description: entering the covered tunnel from the open underpass area
approaching tunnel exit with bright sunlight becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit tunnel, passing pedestrians and staying on the right side walkway

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the tunnel with headlights on

entered.detail: linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the tunnel ceiling
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow pedestrian tunnel illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights. The right wall is covered in vibrant graffiti while vehicles pass by on the left. Several pedestrians walk in both directions, and the tunnel gradually brightens as the exit approaches, revealing sunlight streaming in from the far end.

events.description: exiting the dark tunnel into bright morning sunlight causing lens flare
crossing the urban intersection as traffic lights change

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and crossing the street intersection toward the Arasaka building

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the corner near the Arasaka building

entered.detail: massive black corporate building with white Arasaka logo and red neon accent lighting
wide urban crossroads with traffic signals and crosswalk markings
traffic signal showing red light for pedestrians
multi-level highway overpasses and ramps overhead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into brilliant sunlight, the scene opens into a vast urban intersection dominated by the imposing Arasaka corporate building on the right. The player crosses the street as traffic flows by, with elevated highway structures visible overhead. The lighting shifts dramatically from artificial to natural, casting long shadows across the concrete.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban thoroughfare with elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: passing speed limit 40 sign while continuing along the waterfront sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk parallel to the multi-lane road, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: stream of cars driving along the multi-lane road including a black sedan

entered.detail: road sign indicating speed limit of 40 mounted on a pole
tall modern street lighting poles along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along the Arasaka Waterfront sidewalk, the player moves parallel to a busy multi-lane road with moderate traffic. The massive Arasaka building remains prominent on the right, its red neon accents glowing in the morning light. Elevated highway ramps crisscross overhead, and the player passes a speed limit sign while maintaining a steady walking pace alongside scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dimly lit urban underpass into the brilliant morning light of a corporate district. It begins beneath massive red advertising billboards, moving across a yellow-striped pedestrian crossing and past parked cars toward a looming tunnel entrance. As the camera enters the narrow pedestrian tunnel, the environment shifts to a corridor of fluorescent lights and vibrant graffiti before the far end gradually brightens with streaming sunlight. The scene then opens into a vast urban intersection where the lighting transforms from artificial warmth to natural brilliance, revealing the imposing Arasaka corporate building and elevated highway structures overhead. Finally, the movement continues along the Arasaka Waterfront sidewalk, passing a speed limit sign and scattered pedestrians while the massive corporate tower and its red neon accents dominate the right side of the frame.
